grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/02บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม ลึก 0.10 ม. เซาะร่อง หรือฝังเส้น PVC. ระแนงบังแดดเหล็ก ดูแบบขยาย (A-16). Sloped roofline visible edge-on with a small angle marker (printed '9', likely a misread/very-small rendering of the roof plan's confirmed 'SLOPE 6°'). Grid callouts along the bottom, left to right: F, E, D, C, B, A, with dimension chain 1.50 | 4.00 | 2.00 | 3.60 | 1.80 | 3.15 (=14.55) plus 1.60 at the far end.
description: Elevation 2 (รูปด้าน 2), the long side facade spanning gridF to gridA, showing the roof's monopitch slope edge-on (rising toward the north/F end). Openings: a vent/louvre panel near gridF (X-hatched, under a steel sunshade lattice), a window (hexagon '1'), a smaller window (hexagon '2'), another window (hexagon '1'), and a large X-hatched opening near gridA/B (carport opening, height 2.45m). Level datum matches elevation 1: ±0.00 to +0.60 (floor) to +3.75 (roof beam level at the low end).
warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the 1.50/4.00/2.00/3.60/1.80/3.15 dimension chain (total 14.55, plus a further 1.60m beyond gridA) exactly matches the floor plan's y-axis grid (F=0.0,E=4.0,D=6.0,C=9.6,B=11.4,A=14.55) — fully consistent, no dummy grid needed. The extra 1.60m beyond gridA is the south roof-canopy/carport overhang zone, consistent with the roof plan's carport canopy extension at +3.65.
This page (A-06) contains two elevations; the first (รูปด้าน 1) is in sibling file _หน้า08_elevation1.json.

Small roof-pitch angle callout near the ridge is printed as what reads like a lone digit ('9') at very small scale — same ambiguity/misread risk documented on house 1's elevation 2 sheet (where a similarly tiny slope digit was misread as '9' instead of the roof plan's confirmed '6'). Flagged accordingly rather than asserted as a genuine 9-degree pitch; the roof_plan sheet's clearly legible 'SLOPE 6°' labels (see _หน้า07_roof_plan.json) should be treated as authoritative.
The X-hatched panel near gridA/B (2.45m tall) matches the carport-side opening dimension also seen in the door/window schedule sheet.
